title: Mobicool ME24 Electric Cooler — 23L, 12V & 230V
short_description: A 23-litre electric cooler for vehicle and mains power. The Mobicool ME24 runs on 12 V DC or 230 V AC and holds up to 33 cans.
long_description: The Mobicool ME24 is a thermoelectric cooler with 23 litres of usable capacity. It can run from a vehicle's 12 V socket while travelling and from 230 V mains power at a campsite or at home. The interior holds up to 33 cans or four 1.5-litre bottles laid horizontally. Its carry handle also helps secure or support the lid.
buying_angle: Useful for camping, road trips, and day outings when a compact cooler needs to run both in a vehicle and from a 230 V socket.
seo_title: Mobicool ME24 23L Cooler – 12V & 230V | Daily Deal Finder
meta_description: Mobicool ME24 electric cooler with 23 litres of usable capacity, 12 V and 230 V operation, and space for up to 33 cans.
alt_text: Mobicool ME24 electric cooler with 23L capacity
pinterest_description: The Mobicool ME24 offers 23 litres of capacity and runs from 12 V in a vehicle or 230 V mains power. A practical choice for camping and road trips. #camping #cooler #mobicool
